name: The Shimizu Bank, Ltd.
summary: The Shimizu Bank, Ltd. provides various banking services in Japan. The company offers cash calculation, credit guaranteeing, leasing, and credit card services. It also manages real estate properties; and provides personnel delegation services, as well as financial and economic research, and training services. As of March 31, 2020, the company operated a network of 78 branches and 1 sub-branch. The Shimizu Bank, Ltd. was founded in 1928 and is headquartered in Shizuoka, Japan.
